summary: Closed TASK-035: enforced structured knowledge-roadmap-code mapping with stale path sanitization, KB doc enrichment, and unscoped-doc lint rule.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Knowledge frontmatter requirements are documented and enforced for ids, summaries, owners, and relevant code/spec links.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Lint checks required frontmatter fields; all 26 KB docs have id/title/state/summary/owners/updated; 13 previously untethered docs now have code_paths.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Roadmap tasks validate spec_paths, code_paths, goals, acceptance, non-goals, verification, and evidence links.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: 22 done/cancelled tasks sanitized of stale code_paths; lint already validates roadmap field completeness and path existence.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Lint/reporting identifies missing or broken horizontal and vertical mappings.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Added unscoped-doc warning for KB docs lacking both code_paths and spec_paths; smoke tests updated to tolerate starter warnings.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Generated views expose compact navigation packets for this mapping without becoming canonical truth.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: index_graph.json includes lint and reconciliation views; health color reflects real lint state.
